description: Sample employee database — validates SELECT queries against a 5-row employees table.
setup_sql: CREATE TABLE employees (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, department TEXT NOT NULL, salary REAL NOT NULL, hire_date TEXT NOT NULL)

test_cases.name: total_count
test_cases.description: Query must return the total employee count

test_cases.name: engineering_count
test_cases.description: Query 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees WHERE department = "Engineering"' must return 3

test_cases.name: avg_salary
test_cases.description: Query must return correct average salary
